title: Uruparia attenuata
taxonomy: Uruparia attenuata is classified in the family of plants known as Malpighiaceae. This family is part of the order Malpighiales. The Malpighiales order belongs to the clade of rosids, which is one of the two main groups of flowering plants. The Malpighiales order is characterized by having a complex system of vascular tissue and a unique type of leaf venation. These characteristics are shared among the species within the order, including Uruparia attenuata.
uses: Uruparia attenuata is known for its traditional medicinal uses in various cultures.
